title: Google Calendar - Deleted Event Not Syncing
excerpt:

posts.author: Garrett (Garrett)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have successfully set up a one-way sync from Google Calendar to Monday.com, tests of new events added to Google Calendar successfully are added to Monday.com in the board I have chosen.

Now when I delete an event from Google Calendar, its corresponding event does not get deleted in Monday.com. I want cancelled/deleted events to also be removed from Monday.com. Is this expected behavior or is there a sync step I am missing?

posts.author: brianray (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: I am having the same issue. Look forward to seeing a resolution posted.
